message:
Fix chat pagination: use oldestCursor instead of lastActivity

The Beeper API uses opaque compound cursors (timestamp|token) for
pagination, not the lastActivity field. Using lastActivity caused
pagination to get stuck after ~45 chats. Using oldestCursor from
the response correctly paginates through all 375 chats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
